sentences.target: Je cherche un job pour cet été.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ dʒɔb puʁ sɛt ete/

translations.fr: Je cherche un job pour cet été.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ dʒɔb puʁ sɛt ete/
translations.en: I’m looking for a job for this summer.
translations.es: Estoy buscando un trabajo para este verano.
translations.de: Ich suche einen Job für diesen Sommer.
translations.it: Sto cercando un lavoro per quest'estate.
translations.yue: 我而家搵緊一份暑期工。
translations.ru: Я ищу работу на это лето.
translations.pt: Estou procurando um trabalho para este verão.
translations.tr: Bu yaz için bir iş arıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một công việc cho mùa hè này.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een baan voor deze zomer.
translations.uk: Я шукаю роботу на це літо.
translations.hi: मैं इस गर्मी के लिए एक नौकरी ढूंढ रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Ψάχνω δουλειά για αυτό το καλοκαίρι.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en jobb til denne sommeren.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari pekerjaan untuk musim panas ini.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter ett jobb till i sommar.
translations.ro: Caut un job pentru vara asta.
translations.da: Jeg søger et job til denne sommer.
translations.ja: この夏の仕事を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the speaker as subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses the action of seeking.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the direct object noun.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the verb 'chercher'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/time complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular (form before vowel/h muet); modifies 'été'.
Common noun meaning 'summer'; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Mon job me prend trop de temps.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃ dʒɔb mə pʁɑ̃ tʁo də tɑ̃/

translations.fr: Mon job me prend trop de temps.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃ dʒɔb mə pʁɑ̃ tʁo də tɑ̃/
translations.en: My job takes too much time.
translations.es: Mi trabajo me lleva demasiado tiempo.
translations.de: Mein Job nimmt zu viel Zeit in Anspruch.
translations.it: Il mio lavoro mi porta via troppo tempo.
translations.ko: 제 일은 시간이 너무 많이 들어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的工作占用了我太多时间。
translations.yue: 我份工花咗我太多時間。
translations.ru: Моя работа отнимает слишком много времени.
translations.pt: Meu trabalho me toma tempo demais.
translations.he: העבודה שלי לוקחת לי יותר מדי זמן.
translations.vi: Công việc của tôi tốn quá nhiều thời gian.
translations.ar: عملي يأخذ مني وقتًا طويلًا جدًا.
translations.nl: Mijn werk kost me te veel tijd.
translations.uk: Моя робота забирає надто багато часу.
translations.hu: A munkám túl sok időt vesz el.
translations.hi: मेरी नौकरी में बहुत समय लगता है।
translations.pl: Moja praca zabiera mi zbyt dużo czasu.
translations.el: Η δουλειά μου μου παίρνει πάρα πολύ χρόνο.
translations.nb: Jobben min tar for mye tid.
translations.id: Pekerjaan saya menyita terlalu banyak waktu.
translations.sv: Mitt jobb tar för mycket tid.
translations.ro: Jobul meu îmi ia prea mult timp.
translations.cs: Moje práce mi zabírá příliš mnoho času.
translations.da: Mit job tager alt for meget tid.
translations.ja: 私の仕事は時間を取りすぎます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'job'.
Common noun, masculine; grammatical subject of 'prend'.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person singular; indirect object of 'prend' (affected experiencer).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'job'.
Degree adverb; modifies the quantity expressed by the partitive 'de temps' (too much).
Preposition used in the partitive construction after 'trop', introducing the noun complement.
Common noun, masculine; object of the 'de' phrase ('trop de temps').

sentences.target: On a enfin trouvé un job stable.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a ɑ̃fɛ̃ tʁuve œ̃ dʒɔb stabl/

translations.fr: On a enfin trouvé un job stable.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a ɑ̃fɛ̃ tʁuve œ̃ dʒɔb stabl/
translations.en: We finally found a stable job.
translations.es: Por fin encontramos un trabajo estable.
translations.de: Wir haben endlich einen festen Job gefunden.
translations.it: Abbiamo finalmente trovato un lavoro stabile.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们终于找到了稳定的工作。
translations.yue: 我哋終於搵到份穩定嘅工。
translations.vi: Cuối cùng chúng tôi đã tìm được một công việc ổn định.
translations.nl: We hebben eindelijk een vaste baan gevonden.
translations.hi: आखिरकार हमें एक स्थिर नौकरी मिल गई।
translations.nb: Vi har endelig funnet en fast jobb.
translations.id: Akhirnya kami menemukan pekerjaan yang stabil.
translations.sv: Vi har äntligen hittat ett fast jobb.
translations.ro: Am găsit în sfârșit un job stabil.
translations.da: Vi har endelig fundet et fast job.
translations.ja: 私たちはついに安定した仕事を見つけました。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject (colloquial 'we'); 3rd person singular agreement.
Auxiliary 'avoir', present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the passé composé.
Adverb; modifies the clause, expressing relief or completion.
Past participle; lexical verb in compound past with 'avoir'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the direct object noun.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'trouvé'.
Adjective; postnominal modifier describing 'job'.

sentences.target: Tu aimes ton job en ce moment.
sentences.reading: /ty ɛm tɔ̃ dʒɔb ɑ̃ sə mɔmɑ̃/

translations.fr: Tu aimes ton job en ce moment.
translations.ipa: /ty ɛm tɔ̃ dʒɔb ɑ̃ sə mɔmɑ̃/
translations.en: You like your job right now.
translations.de: Du magst deinen Job im Moment.
translations.it: Ti piace il tuo lavoro in questo momento.
translations.ko: 너는 지금 네 일이 마음에 들어요.
translations.pt: Você gosta do seu trabalho no momento.
translations.he: אתה אוהב את העבודה שלך כרגע.
translations.vi: Bây giờ bạn thích công việc của mình.
translations.nl: Je vindt je baan nu leuk.
translations.hi: तुम्हें इस समय अपनी नौकरी पसंद है।
translations.el: Σου αρέσει η δουλειά σου αυτή τη στιγμή.
translations.sv: Du gillar ditt jobb just nu.
translations.cs: Teď se ti líbí tvoje práce.
translations.da: Du kan godt lide dit job lige nu.
translations.ja: あなたは今の仕事が好きです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; agrees with 'tu'.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'job'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'aimes'.
Preposition introducing a time expression.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'moment'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'en'.
